message:
feat(core): add transport policy convenience methods and cost estimation

Extends TransportPolicy with ergonomic APIs for the pipeline runtime:

- select_and_record(): combines mode selection and outcome recording in
  a single call, reducing boilerplate at call sites
- estimate_cost(): calculates expected cost for a payload + mode pair
  using the configured TransportCostModel (compress + transfer + decompress
  for Compressed mode, network-only for Bypass, zero for Local)
- mode_distribution(): returns (local, compressed, bypass) shares as
  fractions of total decisions for observability dashboards
- avg_cost_per_byte(): average microsecond cost per byte across all
  recorded transport decisions

Plus additional latency budget tracking and degradation detection
extensions (~195 lines total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
